prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次依次约9201→10143→14698→10985→13302名，整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年基准约13302名；近两年波动幅度约2300–3700名 ，显示竞争格局不稳定；该校在广西物理类招生计划2021年61人、2022年58人、2023年62人、2024年61人、2025年73人、2026年77人，2026年较2025年扩 招约5.5%，名额增加有利于降低录取门槛。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第40名，近年稳定在38–40名区间，属中上游985层次；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏正面（正面事件6件、负面2件），主要涉及校园人文关怀获好评；抖音热度排名第53位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上，报考关 注度有所升温；近年无投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估：草学A+、生态学A+、化学A-、地理学A-、生物学A-；草学与生态学为全国顶尖水平，与该校草业科学、 生态学等招生专业直接对应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度高热推荐，与该校物理类招生专业（计算机类、电子信息类、物 理学类等）高度契合，可能吸引更多高分考生报考；广西2026年普通高考总人数约39.2万，较2025年（约38.0万）增加约3.3%，物理类考生估算约26.9万，竞争基数扩大；兰州大学位于甘肃兰州，距广西较远，但作为西北地区唯一一所综合性985，对跨省考生仍具吸引力；该校在广西物理类招生计划占比较大（2025年73人），属该校在 南方省份的重点生源地之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次13302名、2026年扩招约5.5%（推低位次数字增大）、广西考生总数增加约3.3%（推高位次数字减小）、声誉 偏正面及工科专业热度高（吸引报考，推高位次数字减小）等多重因素，扩招效应与考生增加、热度上升存在对冲；预计2026年最低位次约13799名，区间13299–14299名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 9201 → 10143 → 14698 → 10985 → 13302, showing an overall fluctuating and shifting trend, with a baseline of about 13302 in 2025; the fluctuation range in recent two years is about 2300–3700, indicating unstable competition; the enrollment plan for this university in Guangxi Physics Category was 61 in 2021, 58 in 2022, 62 in 2023, 61 in 2024, 73 in 2025, and 77 in 2026, with an increase of about 5.5% from 2025 to 2026, which helps lower the admission threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 40th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 38–40 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 985 universities; the reputation evaluation in the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is relatively positive (6 positive events, 2 negative), mainly involving campus humanistic care receiving praise; Douyin popularity ranking is 53rd (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure, and application attention has increased; no record of enrollment gaps in recent years; fifth round of discipline evaluation: Grassland Science A+, Ecology A+, Chemistry A-, Geography A-, Biology A-; Grassland Science and Ecology are at the national top level, directly corresponding to the university's enrollment majors such as Grassland Science and Ecology.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended with social heat, highly matching the university's Physics Category enrollment majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Physics, etc.), which may attract more high-scoring candidates; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Guangxi in 2026 is about 392,000, an increase of about 3.3% from 2025 (about 380,000), with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 269,000, expanding the competition base; Lanzhou University is located in Lanzhou, Gansu, far from Guangxi, but as the only comprehensive 985 university in the northwest, it still attracts cross-province candidates; the university's enrollment plan in Guangxi Physics Category accounts for a relatively large proportion (73 in 2025), making it one of the key source regions for the university in southern provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 13302, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 5.5% (pushing the ranking number higher), the increase in Guangxi candidate total by about 3.3% (pushing the ranking number lower), the positive reputation, and the high popularity of engineering majors (attracting applications, pushing the ranking number lower), the expansion effect and the increase in candidates and popularity offset each other; it is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be about 13799, with a range of 13299–14299.

Candidates within this range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors (Physics, Atmospheric Science, Chemistry, etc.) as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Clinical Medicine) as reach targets; candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<13299) can focus on Tier 1 flagship majors; candidates with rankings near the upper limit (>14299) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options, while also paying attention to the admission opportunities brought by the university's enrollment expansion.
